item.title: Building the Farmhouse: Concrete Footings (Day 3)
item.description: Day 3 of building the farmhouse focuses on concrete footings and early foundation work. A practical look at the tools, site progress, and the building process from the ground up. What comes next?

item.title: Measuring Tips & More | Farmhouse Build
item.description: Measuring tips and more from a farmhouse build, with a focus on layout, tools, and the building process. A practical look at job site work and project progress—what measuring methods do you use?

item.title: This Tool Is a Game Changer: Honest Review
item.description: A practical review of a tool used in construction and building work, with a focus on how it performs on the job site and supports hands-on project progress. What do you think of this tool?

item.title: How To Frame a Porch Roof Like a Pro
item.description: A practical look at framing a porch roof, with a focus on tools, layout, and building steps. Clean, hands-on construction work from start to finish. How do you approach porch roof framing?

media:content.media:description: A practical look at framing a porch roof, with a focus on tools, layout, and building steps. Clean, hands-on construction work from start to finish. How do you approach porch roof framing?

item.title: 3 Key Numbers for House Layout
item.description: A practical look at the three numbers used to lay out a house on site. Focused on building accuracy, tools, and the steps that help keep the project on track. What matters most in your layout process?

item.title: Quick Tips We Use Every Day to Nail Nails
item.description: Practical nail-setting tips used on the job every day, with a focus on speed, accuracy, and clean results. A simple look at the tools and techniques that help keep building work moving smoothly.

item.title: Wall Building: Nails, Placement & Techniques

item.title: What’s Wrong With This Deck? How Can We Fix It?

item.title: What to Do When Installing Kitchen Cabinets
item.description: A practical guide to installing kitchen cabinets, covering layout, leveling, fastening, and alignment steps. The video focuses on accuracy and proper installation techniques for a clean finish. What part of cabinet installation do you think is the trickiest?

media:content.media:title: What to Do When Installing Kitchen Cabinets
media:content.media:description: A practical guide to installing kitchen cabinets, covering layout, leveling, fastening, and alignment steps. The video focuses on accuracy and proper installation techniques for a clean finish. What part of cabinet installation do you think is the trickiest?

item.title: Unboxing a Brand New Stiletto Hammer
item.description: A simple unboxing of a brand new Stiletto hammer, focusing on the tool itself and what it brings to the job site. A practical look at a key piece of building gear for construction and hands-on work.
